name_en: M69024💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To continue paying tribute to the brand's design heritage, Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh returns to the Monogram pattern this season, creating this Multiple wallet using the brand's iconic Monogram canvas paired with natural leather. This wallet features multiple pockets and inner compartments, maintaining a compact size while offering practical internal space, easily fitting into most pockets. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm ~
